{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Monarch sacred arts
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Monarchs]] possess [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
